sections.paragraph:
verb לקטון

to grow smaller

verb להקטין

to reduce, make smaller, diminish

verb הוקטן

be reduced, made smaller, diminished

adjective

little, small, tiny, inconsiderable, petty, fractional, micro, minor, petit, pocket, poky, puny, scrubby, short, slight, slim, thin, wee, wispy; young; insignificant

adjective

growing smaller, diminishing
